21235020.name: The Emperor's Mantle
21235020.desc:
Turn Start: Gain Shield equal to Green Roaches x 100
On Kill: Gain 10 [DefenseBug] but green
Turn Start: Gain 4 ~ 10 [DefenseBug] but green
21235020.flavor: The Legion of (Green) Roaches moves for no one but its Emperor.

21235030.name: Deity's Revival
21235030.desc: (One Time) If Green Emperor's health is below 0, regain 25% health and gain 1 ~ 2 [PlusCoinValueDown]

21235040.name: Emperor's Guard
21235040.flavor: The Emperor's guard will not falter

21235050.name: Emperor's Legion
21235050.desc:
[WinDuel] Inflict 3 [OffenseBug] but green
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [OffenseBug] but green
[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] Inflict 2 [OffenseBug] but green
21235050.flavor: Rip, seep, trickle, carve, tear, devour.

21235060.name: Roach's Feast
21235060.desc: At Round Start: Gain [DefenseBug] but green equal to current [OffenseBug] but green stacks, then lose 50% of [OffenseBug] but green

21235070.name: Binding Vow
21235070.desc: Heal 1% max health for every 1 stack of Binding Vows on The Green Emperor (Max 6%)
21235070.flavor: Why did I add this passive?
